fulltext: when start_button liquid_mixer shall immediately satisfy if ! liquid_level_1 then valve_0
when liquid_level_1 liquid_mixer shall immediately satisfy ! valve_0
when liquid_level_1 the liquid_mixer shall until emergency_button satisfy if ! liquid_level_2 then valve_1
when liquid_level_2 the liquid_mixer shall immediately satisfy !valve_1
when liquid_level_2 the liquid_mixer shall immediately satisfy timer_60sec_start
when liquid_level_2, the liquid_mixer shall until (timer_60sec_expire | emergency_button) satisfy stirring_motor
when timer_60sec_expire the liquid_mixer shall immediately satisfy timer_120sec_start
when timer_60sec_expire, the liquid_mixer shall until (timer_120sec_expire | emergency_button) satisfy valve_2
when emergency_button, the liquid_mixer shall immediately satisfy ! valve_0
when emergency_button the liquid_mixer shall immediately satisfy ! valve_1
when emergency_button the liquid_mixer shall immediately satisfy ! valve_2
when emergency_button the liquid_mixer shall immediately satisfy ! stirring_motor
